name: theseus-pro
description: Intelligence engineering plugin for building Theseus (Index-API): compound learning, enrichment pipelines, and multi-agent reasoning workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Build and evolve the Theseus intelligence engine.
interface.longDescription: Expert workflows for Index-API/Theseus across epistemic retrieval, learned scoring, GNN/KGE/SBERT enrichment, compound learning, and systems-level orchestration.
defaultPrompt: Implement the next Theseus roadmap slice with code/spec reconciliation.
Run a focused /train plan for EpiGNN, KGE, or SBERT enrichment.
Apply /learn to capture session knowledge and update confidence.
